main: What's the most overrated food that people pretend to love?
trap: What's the most underrated food that nobody talks about enough?

main: What would you do with £10 million that nobody would expect?
trap: What would you do with £10 million that everyone would expect?

main: What's the worst piece of advice your parents ever gave you?
trap: What's the best piece of advice your parents ever gave you?

main: What's the first thing you'd do if you woke up as the opposite gender?
trap: What's the last thing you'd do if you woke up as the opposite gender?

main: What's a job that sounds important but is secretly useless?
trap: What's a job that sounds useless but is secretly important?

main: What's the most embarrassing thing you've searched on Google?
trap: What's the most boring thing you've searched on Google?

main: What's something you're irrationally afraid of?
trap: What's something you're irrationally NOT afraid of?

main: What's the worst movie everyone else seems to love?
trap: What's the best movie everyone else seems to hate?

main: What would you eat for your last meal on Earth?
trap: What would you refuse to eat even for your last meal on Earth?

main: What's the most useless talent you have?
trap: What's the most impressive talent you have?

main: What animal would you be if you had no choice, and why?
trap: What animal would you never want to be, and why?

main: What's the most childish thing you still do as an adult?
trap: What's the most adult thing you started doing earlier than expected?

main: What's something everyone lies about on a first date?
trap: What's something nobody lies about on a first date?

main: What country would you permanently leave if things got too bad here?
trap: What country would you never move to no matter what?

main: What's the dumbest thing you've spent real money on?
trap: What's the smartest thing you've spent money on that surprised you?

main: What's a conspiracy theory you secretly think might be true?
trap: What's a conspiracy theory you think is definitely false?

main: What's the worst thing about being famous?
trap: What's the best thing about being famous?

main: What skill do you wish you had but have absolutely zero talent for?
trap: What skill do you have that nobody asked for?

main: What's the most dangerous thing you've done that you'd do again?
trap: What's the most dangerous thing you've done that you'd never repeat?

main: What's something you thought was cool at 15 that you cringe at now?
trap: What's something you thought was uncool at 15 that you actually like now?

main: What's a rule in society that you think is completely pointless?
trap: What's a rule in society that you think more people should follow?

main: What's the worst gift you've ever received?
trap: What's the best gift you've ever received?

main: What would you change about yourself if you could change just one thing?
trap: What would you keep the same about yourself even if you could change everything?

main: What's the most embarrassing reason you've ever cried?
trap: What's the most legitimate reason you've ever cried?

main: What famous person would you most want to have dinner with?
trap: What famous person would you least want to be trapped with at dinner?

main: What's your go-to excuse when you don't want to go somewhere?
trap: What's your go-to reason when you actually DO want to go somewhere?

main: What's the most overconfident thing you've ever done?
trap: What's the most underconfident thing you've ever done?

main: What's a compliment that secretly annoys you?
trap: What's a criticism that secretly pleases you?

main: What's the weirdest thing you've done when home alone?
trap: What's the most normal thing you do when home alone?

main: If you had to describe yourself in one word you'd hate, what would it be?
trap: If you had to describe yourself in one word you'd love, what would it be?

main: What's the most illegal thing you've done that you'd admit to?
trap: What's the most legal but morally questionable thing you've done?

main: What's something you believe that most of your friends don't?
trap: What's something most of your friends believe that you secretly agree with?

main: What's the pettiest thing you've ever done in an argument?
trap: What's the most mature thing you've ever done in an argument?

main: What's a hobby that sounds cool until you try it?
trap: What's a hobby that sounds boring until you try it?

main: What's the most offensive joke you find genuinely funny?
trap: What's a joke that's supposed to be funny that you genuinely don't get?

main: What's something you'd do differently if nobody was watching?
trap: What's something you do exactly the same whether or not anyone's watching?

main: What would you do if you found out you had 30 days to live?
trap: What would you do if you found out you were going to live forever?

main: What's your unpopular opinion about relationships?
trap: What's your popular opinion about relationships that you'd rather not admit?

main: What's a social norm you think is weird but you still follow?
trap: What's a social norm you refuse to follow no matter what?

main: What's something you'd never do for £1 million?
trap: What's something you'd do for free that most people would charge for?

main: What's the most embarrassing song in your playlist?
trap: What's the song in your playlist you're most proud of?

main: What's a lie you've told that got way out of hand?
trap: What's a truth you've told that nobody believed?

main: What's the worst job you've ever had?
trap: What's the best job you've ever had?

main: What celebrity death would actually upset you?
trap: What celebrity death would you find yourself completely indifferent to?

main: What's a bad habit you've given up but secretly miss?
trap: What's a good habit you've started but secretly resent?

main: What's the most dramatic way you've ever quit or left something?
trap: What's the most undramatic way you've ever quit or left something?

main: What's your most embarrassing sports or games story?
trap: What's your proudest sports or games moment?

main: What's something you've done that you told no one about?
trap: What's something you've done that you told everyone about?

main: What's the worst thing about getting older?
trap: What's the best thing about getting older?

main: What's the most ridiculous thing you've ever argued about?
trap: What's the most serious thing you've ever argued about?

main: What's a word or phrase that instantly makes you dislike someone?
trap: What's a word or phrase that instantly makes you warm to someone?

main: What's something from your childhood you wish still existed?
trap: What's something from your childhood you're glad no longer exists?

main: What's the least impressive thing you've ever bragged about?
trap: What's the most impressive thing you've never bragged about?

main: What's the worst advice you've ever followed?
trap: What's the best advice you've ever ignored?

main: What's something you hate doing but are weirdly good at?
trap: What's something you love doing but are weirdly bad at?

main: What's the stupidest argument you've had with a close friend?
trap: What's the most important argument you've had with a close friend?

main: What's the first thing you'd buy if you won the lottery tonight?
trap: What's the last thing you'd buy even with unlimited lottery money?

main: What's the most embarrassing thing your phone's camera roll reveals about you?
trap: What's the most endearing thing your phone's camera roll reveals about you?

main: What's a movie plot hole that ruined the film for you?
trap: What's a movie plot hole you noticed but chose to ignore?

main: What's the most unrealistic expectation you had about adult life?
trap: What's the most realistic expectation about adult life that actually came true?

main: What fictional universe would you hate to actually live in?
trap: What fictional universe would you genuinely love to live in?
